name: Fertilizer Production Chemical Tax Exclusion

eligibility.description: Must be used by the manufacturer or sold for use/resale in the manufacture or production of fertilizer or direct application as fertilizer.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes nitric acid, sulfuric acid, ammonia, or methane used to produce ammonia from the §4661 excise tax if used as a qualified fertilizer substance.
